allow: PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "d:\\Freelance Projects\\Scanner\\vendor" | Out-Null; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jsqr@1.4.0/dist/jsQR.js" -OutFile "d:\\Freelance Projects\\Scanner\\vendor\\jsQR.js"; \(Get-Item "d:\\Freelance Projects\\Scanner\\vendor\\jsQR.js"\).Length)
